headline: Gear Up for American Tower (AMT) Q2 Earnings: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Evaluate the expected performance of American Tower (AMT) for the quarter ended June 2026, looking beyond the conventional Wall Street top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining some of its key metrics for better insight.
